comments.content: Critical Issue: `fmt.Sprintf` does not return an error. It only returns a string. The function signature is `func Sprintf(format string, a ...any) string`. This error handling is incorrect and will cause a compilation error.
Missing boundary condition: `os.Args[1]` will panic with an index out of range error if no command-line arguments are provided. Should check if `len(os.Args) > 1` before accessing the argument.
